posts.text:
I’ve received a lot of criticism for the Morning Note’s coverage of this absurd new war. Most has centered around the idea that the newsletter “sounds like a Democrat” because it doesn’t get on its knees for the president when he abandons his campaign promises. My response is simple: I do not care.

My allegiance is not to the Republican Party, MAGA, or any trivial political faction that’s more concerned about upholding toxic partisanship than serving our country. It is to America. I voted for T
